PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF CONSERVATOR OF PERSON, CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2005, GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER, ASSESSMENT FEE OF $690.00, CONSERVATOR ORDERED TO TRAINING CLASS BY MAR-22-2006 PAYMENT OF ASSESSMENT IS DEFERRED. COURT IS APPOINTING GERONE MATHEWS AS THE CONSERVATOR OF PERSON. MS. WOODFORD IS ENTITLED TO HAVE ACCESS TO ALL MEDICAL LINFORMATION. THE DOCTOR IS AUTHORIZED TO RELEASE THE INFORMATION TO HER. MS.
